nodes.label: Backend Manager Script
nodes.rationale: PID file tracking for reliable backend process management with graceful stop and force-kill fallback

nodes.label: Shared TypeScript Configuration
nodes.rationale: Strict mode, ES2024 target, isolated modules, and declaration maps for robust TypeScript compilation across workspaces

nodes.label: Deployment Documentation
nodes.rationale: Container environment lacks systemd, requiring manual service commands and PM2 startup; frontend build incomplete due to npm workspace issues so backend runs via tsx directly

nodes.label: Agent Instructions (Graphify Rules)
nodes.rationale: Defines graphify query workflow: use query/path/explain first, read GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture, update graph after code changes

nodes.label: Restart Notes
nodes.rationale: pm2 resurrect restores saved processes but may use cached code; always run pm2 restart all after a system restart to ensure latest code is loaded

nodes.label: tsconfig.app.json
nodes.rationale: Configures baseUrl and paths to support @/* alias imports, matching the Vite resolve alias for consistent module resolution across IDE and bundler.

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.rationale: Dark-mode first via class='dark' on the html element, used with Tailwind CSS v4 dark mode strategy.

nodes.label: public-layout.tsx
nodes.rationale: Marketing and public pages layout that includes Navbar, Outlet, and Footer; distinct from AppLayout which omits the Footer for authenticated app pages.

nodes.label: root-layout.tsx
nodes.rationale: Base layout providing flex column min-h-screen structure; serves as the outermost route wrapper for all pages.

nodes.label: app-layout.tsx
nodes.rationale: Authenticated app pages layout with Navbar and Outlet but no Footer, keeping the UI focused on app functionality.

nodes.label: QueryClient Configuration
nodes.rationale: QueryClient configured with retry:1, refetchOnWindowFocus:false, staleTime:5min to reduce unnecessary network requests while maintaining reasonable data freshness.

nodes.label: ProtectedRoute
nodes.rationale: Standard auth guard pattern that redirects unauthenticated users to /login while showing a loading spinner during auth state resolution.

nodes.label: AdminRoute
nodes.rationale: Extends the basic auth guard with an admin role check, redirecting non-admin authenticated users to /dashboard.

nodes.label: GuestRoute
nodes.rationale: Inverse auth guard that redirects already-authenticated users away from guest pages (login/register) to /dashboard.

nodes.label: Vite Dev Proxy Config
nodes.rationale: Proxies /api requests to http://localhost:3000 during development, integrating with a backend API server running on port 3000.

nodes.label: useStreamingAgent Hook
nodes.rationale: Uses a mutable ref-based StreamAccumulator (not React state) to avoid excessive re-renders during high-frequency SSE events. Batches rapid events into ~60fps renders via a 16ms interval. Resets accumulators on EventSource connect because the server replays buffered events, and local persistence would duplicate content.

nodes.label: NewProjectPage Component
nodes.rationale: Multi-step wizard (5 steps) for project creation. Uses sessionStorage to preserve form state across GitHub OAuth redirects. Directly calls fetch for GitHub clone and ZIP upload endpoints rather than the api wrapper because these require multipart/form-data or special handling.

nodes.label: WorkspacePage Component
nodes.rationale: Implements a 3-pane workspace layout (chat, file tree, editor) with mobile tab switching. Supports two layout modes (chat-first and code-first) persisted via project.layoutMode. Integrates GitHub push/pull, CodeRabbit code review with auto-fix flow, and JAR download.

nodes.label: ChatSession Component
nodes.rationale: Waits for session snapshot before opening SSE to avoid connecting against terminal sessions while session data is still loading. Tracks message count at stream start to detect the handoff from streaming overlay to persisted agent message, avoiding visual gaps. Only auto-scrolls for new messages, not during streaming, to prevent jarring jumps.

nodes.label: EditorPanel Component
nodes.rationale: Handles Ctrl+S keyboard shortcut for saving files. Tracks editedContent separately from fetched content to show unsaved changes indicator and enable dirty-state save button.

nodes.label: Migration 0003: No-op Duplicate
nodes.rationale: Explicitly commented as a no-op duplicate of 0002_opencode_bridge, yet recorded in _journal.json as an applied migration (idx 3), indicating it was deliberately included in the migration chain despite making no schema changes.

nodes.label: Migration 0004: CodeRabbit Integration
nodes.rationale: Absent from _journal.json (which records 0004_hard_corsair for idx 4), indicating this migration has not been applied to the database.

nodes.label: Migration 0005: Project Visibility (Unapplied)
nodes.rationale: Contains identical SQL to 0005_heavy_scorpion but is absent from _journal.json, suggesting it may be an unapplied duplicate or alternate migration path.

nodes.label: Migration 0010: GitHub OAuth
nodes.rationale: Absent from _journal.json, which ends at idx 9 (0009_next_vulture), indicating this migration has not yet been applied.

nodes.label: Drizzle Migration Journal
nodes.rationale: Records applied migrations 0000 through 0009. Missing entries for 0004_add_coderabbit, 0005_add_visibility, and 0010_github_oauth indicate these migrations have not been applied.

nodes.label: OpenCode Process Manager
nodes.rationale: Hard timeout on startup path (45s) to prevent hung startups from deadlocking the bridge. Partial state is torn down if timeout fires.

nodes.label: Session Event Bus
nodes.rationale: Bridge-agnostic event bus so SSE endpoint can subscribe without knowing which bridge produced events. Buffers non-terminal events for late-joining subscribers with auto-cleanup after 60s.

nodes.label: authMiddleware
nodes.rationale: Validates session cookie against DB with explicit expiry check; extends FastifyRequest type for type-safe user attachment.

nodes.label: coderabbitRoutes
nodes.rationale: Automates CodeRabbit CLI login via tmux headless sessions and manages per-project AI code reviews.

nodes.label: communityRoutes
nodes.rationale: Implements public project discovery, forking with filesystem copy, and ZIP download for community sharing.

nodes.label: projectRoutes
nodes.rationale: Full project CRUD with filesystem sandboxing under /home/auroracraft-*, git initialization, and JAR artifact serving. Cleans up bridge sessions before deletion.

nodes.label: adminRoutes
nodes.rationale: Admin dashboard endpoints including user/project counts and Kiro CLI authentication status checks.

nodes.label: agentRoutes
nodes.rationale: Manages AI agent sessions via SSE streaming, message exchange, and asynchronous execution through bridge abstractions.

nodes.label: githubRoutes
nodes.rationale: GitHub OAuth flow and git repository operations (branch listing, remote setup, push, reset) with token injection.

nodes.label: authRoutes
nodes.rationale: Registration and login with bcrypt password hashing, 7-day cookie sessions, and automatic Linux system user provisioning.

nodes.label: createSystemUser
nodes.rationale: Creates isolated Linux system users (auroracraft-* prefix) per app user for filesystem-level sandboxing and defense in depth.
